title: cell-lifetime budgets at the claim door + audited reset (D2)
action: Per D2 (+Δ1/Δ2/Δ3/F2/F3 folded in CONTEXT Validating amendments): FREEZE FIRST (test_claim_race + test_lib green recorded). Budget check INSIDE the O_EXCL critical section: after claimCellFile succeeds in claimCellCrossSession, compute counts; on refusal releaseClaim (unwind precedent cells.mjs:951) and return typed refusal. Counting (Δ1): claims_used = distinct (claim_session, claimed_at) pairs in trace.attempts occurring AFTER the latest trace.budget_resets marker, +1 for the current acquisition; failed_attempts = fail/blocked entries after the marker; same-signature = max identical-signature run after the marker. budgets = cell.budgets or {max_claims:3,max_failed_attempts:4,max_same_signature:2}. Exceed => typed {ok:false,code:CELL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED,budget,used,history_summary,fix}; two same-signature fails => next claim {code:REPEATED_FAILURE,signature,fix}. Δ3/F3: claimNextCell SELECTION skips exhausted/repeated cells (reads candidate ledger cheaply) — pool never bricks; only direct cells claim --id surfaces the refusal. New verb cells reset-budget --id --reason (registry both copies): requires reason, logs a decision, appends {reset_at,reason,by_session} to trace.budget_resets (append-only), never edits attempts. EXPLICIT rows: gate_bypass=total still refuses both codes (loop-safety, not an approval gate); enforcement-lands-at-next-claim bounded-overrun documented in the test; budget racer case added to test_claim_race without disturbing scenarios a-c. Regen inside cell: mirror + render + manifest.

truths: a fresh cell with no history claims exactly as today
refusals name the exhausted budget and the sanctioned door
reset never rewrites or deletes ledger history
artifacts: budget test rows incl. bypass-immunity row, deliberate-red recorded
prohibitions: no gate_bypass branch may skip these refusals
no wall-clock budget in this cell

verify: node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: D2 cell-lifetime budgets shipped: checkCellBudgets enforces max_claims/max_failed_attempts/max_same_signature INSIDE claimCellCrossSession's O_EXCL critical section (after claimCellFile succeeds, before claimCell), refusing typed CELL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED or REPEATED_FAILURE and unwinding the just-acquired claim file on refusal (D2+delta2). claimNextCell SELECTION now skips exhausted/repeated candidates via the same check (delta3/F3) so a single bricked cell never bricks the pool; only a direct 'cells claim --id' surfaces the typed refusal. New verb 'cells reset-budget --id --reason' is the sole reopening door: requires a reason, logs a decision, appends {reset_at,reason,by_session} to append-only trace.budget_resets, never touches trace.attempts. gate_bypass=total does NOT bypass either refusal (structural), proven by an explicit test row. test_claim_race.mjs gained scenario (d): 8 real racers against an already-exhausted budget -> 0 winners, no orphaned claim-store file. +9 lib tests, +4 CLI tests. Freeze-first + deliberate-red both recorded; mirror/render/manifest regenerated in-cell.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs (D1 revision-ledger suites around line 950-1055, claimNextCell suites around line 6636-7040)",
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (cells claim/verify/cap/block CLI suites around line 2089-2230, DA5 bijection probe around line 208-280)",
    "scripts/test_claim_race.mjs (scenarios a/b/c, the O_EXCL claim-file/unwind precedent this cell extends)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "test_lib.mjs +9: fresh-cell-claims-as-today, 3-claims-exhaust-4th-refused (CELL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED naming max_claims + unorphaned claim file), 2-identical-signature-fails-refuse-next (REPEATED_FAILURE), per-cell budgets override honored, resetCellBudget appends budget_resets+logs decision+preserves attempts+reopens door, resetCellBudget requires a reason/refuses unknown id, gate_bypass=total does NOT bypass the refusal, claimNextCell selection skips an exhausted candidate in favor of a healthy one, claimNextCell returns NO_APPROVED_WORK (not the refusal) when the only candidate is exhausted while direct claim --id still surfaces it",
    "test_bee_cli.mjs +4: cells reset-budget dispatcher wiring (appends budget_resets, reason round-trips), reset-budget refuses without --reason, claim-door CELL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED through the real dispatcher end to end (3 claim/verify/unclaim cycles then a refused 4th, then reset-budget reopens it), cells.reset-budget registry example exercised (DA5 bijection + example-coverage guards both required this: cellsUsageFallback's Use: line and the demo-1 chain)",
    "scripts/test_claim_race.mjs +1 scenario (d): 8 real OS-process racers against a cell whose ledger is pre-seeded at exactly the max_claims budget"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Deliberate-red proof (live run, not just a git-show): commented out the entire budget-check block (const cellForBudget = readCell(root, id); if (cellForBudget) { const budgetCheck = checkCellBudgets(cellForBudget); if (!budgetCheck.ok) { releaseClaim(root, session, id); return budgetCheck; } }) inside claimCellCrossSession in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/cells.mjs (mirrored to .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs), then reran the full verify chain. Exactly 6 of 382 test_lib.mjs tests failed (all 6 new D2 lib tests: the max_claims-exhaustion test, the REPEATED_FAILURE same-signature test, the custom-budgets-override test, the resetCellBudget-reopens-the-door test [failed because its precondition 'the door should be exhausted' never became true], the gate_bypass=total-does-not-bypass test, and the claimNextCell-NO_APPROVED_WORK-when-only-candidate-is-exhausted test), plus exactly 1 of 193 test_bee_cli.mjs tests (the claim-door CELL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED-through-the-dispatcher test), plus test_claim_race.mjs scenario (d) failed with 1 unexpected winner and a leaked claim-store file. Every other test in all three suites stayed green throughout (376/382, 192/193, and scenarios a/b/c), exactly matching what the break did and did not touch -- proving these new rows genuinely exercise the guard rather than passing vacuously. Restored the block, diffed templates/lib/cells.mjs against .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs -> byte-identical, then reran the full chain -> 0 failed everywhere. Before this cell, claimCellCrossSession had no budget concept at all (readCell(root,id) was never called between claimCellFile and claimCell) -- a claim -> block -> re-dispatch cycle could loop at a single cell indefinitely, which is the exact gap #1 of the Builder-Judge-Manager assessment this feature closes.",
  "verification_run": "Freeze-first baseline (before any edit): node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check -> all green (test_claim_race PASS a/b/c, test_lib 373/0, test_bee_cli 189/0, mirror ok, manifest 366 files). Final run after implementation + regen: same command -> test_claim_race PASS a/b/c/d (d new); test_lib.mjs 382 passed/0 failed; test_bee_cli.mjs 193 passed/0 failed; test_lib_mirror green (22 files templates/lib<->bin/lib, 10 hook files); release_manifest --check 366 file(s) match. render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs and release_manifest.mjs --write ran before --check per the lib-touch regen rule. Manual CLI smoke tests (3 isolated temp repos, outside this suite) additionally confirmed: max_claims exhaustion + reset-budget reopening + decision logging end to end, REPEATED_FAILURE on identical signatures, gate_bypass=total immunity, and claim-next skipping an exhausted candidate in favor of a healthy one.",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}
